feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: /o/ Draw thread
entry.content: Not really a common thread here, but let's have a drawthread dedicated to cars and other vehicles. Draw full vehicles, parts, characters interacting with cars, roads and raceways, car memes, anything to do with car culture. You can be pro or just an MS Paint scribbler. Remember to enjoy yourself and have fun.
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: IWTV - The Vampire Lestat
entry.content: The final episode of this shit leaked last night and I haven't seen anyone talking about it here. Insane how far it has fallen, I remember enjoying the first two seasons quite a lot. This season was a pain to sit through, however. Had a few good moments but it doesn't make up for the atrocious pacing, the "clever quips" that are obviously the writers getting high off their own farts and desperately trying to get a viral moment happening every 30 seconds, the off screening of interesting shit, ev
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Enough about hentai games. What about sentai games?

entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Favorite arcade?
entry.content: For me, it’s pic related. They put it in my local arcade right when the movie came out. Don't let it being a movie tie-in game fool you, it was developed by Sega and is a really solid lightgun shooter. It also captures the vibe of Jurassic Park surprisingly well, in part due to great sound design. The experience of getting inside that cabinet in a dark smoky room of the arcade, pulling those drapers behind you, and picking up the gun from the seat side-holster was too hype for my 7 year old brai
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >Before the age of Onions set upon the gods, a legend rose to claim his place am…
entry.content: >Before the age of Onions set upon the gods, a legend rose to claim his place among them. And even though Kratos sat on the throne as the new God of Onions, he was haunted by visions of his wife, a wife he himself was cucked by. But his wife's divorce could not defeat him. Her sisters could not control him. And on this day... the man... the legend... Kratos... will have custody of his wife's son.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

AND MY NAME IS NOT MEHMET No, my name is not MEHMET and I don't know where the nearest KEBAB store is located. Why do you assume I am ARAB? ENOUGH IS ENOUGH, I'M A PERSON NOT A KEBAB OR COCKROACH
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Third Party Controllers
entry.content: I'm currently addicted to buying third party and high end gaming controllers. Please send me the ones you own and recommendations Anons. 8BitDo Ultimate 2: Very light, doesn't get your hands tired. RB and LB buttons are pretty clicky and noisy. You can't set 250-1000hz freely. Flydigi Apex 5: Feels great to hold, very ergonomic controller with great lighting effects. Highly recommended. Fully customizable. Vader 5 Pro: Great choice if you like to play FPS games on your controller. DualSense Edge
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >enters the gpu market >1st gen flops, 2nd gen has huge improvements >drop b580:…
entry.content: >enters the gpu market >1st gen flops, 2nd gen has huge improvements >drop b580: 12gb vram gpu for less than $300 >nukes and pisses on amd cards in productivity, upscaling and ray tracing >actually competitive productivity benchmarks to rtx 4070 >every new driver patch delivers >makes 1440p and future proof gaming for entry level builds possible >brutally rapes, tortures and shits on any budget amd gpu in virtually every aspect for much less power consumption >literally delivers everything these
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

That's just my life now, I clean my apartment more frequently than my mom did in her apartment, but due to this NIGGER heatwave these fuckers are breeding like insane inside my sealed closed off food bin. Then my mom is lecturing me about me having to clean my kitchen, when I clean my fucking kitchen more than that fucking whore does and I have seen fruit flies fly around inside

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Is OPENAI committing fraud? pic rel are the tokens that I've used recently over …
entry.content: Is OPENAI committing fraud? pic rel are the tokens that I've used recently over the past week with gpt 5.6 sol max for a rather small personal project which doesn't involve a lot of coding nor image/video tasks, mostly textual stuff (writing flash cards, extracted from local pdfs). 15.5 B tokens equals around(at 90% input 10% output ratio) The total cost comes out to around: $116,250 there is no way OpenAI isn't overcounting tokens... but why? Are you guys also experiencing similar overinflated
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: "Da Jews" is not an excuse for bad filmmaking
entry.content: I see a bunch of Nolanfags arguing that Nolan was forced by Hollywood Jewery to make an ugly film full of miscast trannies and outdated farm equipment. The reality is that he is just a tasteless Marvelfag status quo enjoyer like everyone else. Soviet filmmakers were working under the duress of being disappeared to Siberia and they made much more subversive films than modern Hollywood directors. Smart directors always find a way. Is reputational damage of being called a Chud worse than being thro
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Is Julia gonna make it?
entry.content: I tried Julia again for a week. Installing packages still takes forever. Importing still takes forever. The plotting performance is abysmal, it struggled with a million data points. I got errors trying and failing to install packages. The documentation us ok, but needs a technical writer to clean it up. I want to like Julia, I want a good Matlab replacement. It's definitely less buggy than the last time I tried it (around 1.0).
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /b/ Random: Mitch watched the speech with his friends last night.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: I’ve watched The Odyssey 11 times
entry.content: Hello everyone. George Carmi here, I’m the co-host of the @reeltokpodcast. As you can see by the title of this blog, I think I’m qualified enough to give my honest review of Christopher Nolan’s newest masterpiece. Here goes nothing: i wish i had something more meaningful to say right now, but i am at a major loss for words. several instances i found my body having a physical reaction to the pure filmmaking magic that i was experiencing. my eyes watered, my body began shaking, and i could feel an
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Do you really want me to believe that this is a conspiracy where 99,99999% peopl…
entry.content: Do you really want me to believe that this is a conspiracy where 99,99999% people are loving Odyssey, only /tv/ sees the truth?
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film
